feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: China basically open-sourced Fable. A Stardew-quality Steam indie can now be com…
entry.content: China basically open-sourced Fable. A Stardew-quality Steam indie can now be completed in a tenth of the time (from 10k hours to 1k hours). If you're a NEET with a strong vision for a game, you'd be crazy not to spend 20 hours a week building a game for one year. The default outcome is decent and the asymmetric upside is fucking insane (probably a 5% of becoming a decamillionaire). Literally a once in a lifetime arbitrage window. >gaming is saturated Good games are still extremely rare. But over
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Streaming AC: Black Flag
entry.content: Returning veteran, thoroughly enjoying the remake so far...so far. Feel free to just chill or shit all over me for posting this on 4chan, either way, couldn't hurt. I'm a nobody streamer. https://www.twitch.tv/reabsorbedtwi n
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Gacha Gameplay
entry.content: Do most gacha games go any deeper than picrel in terms of gameplay? Whenever I see gameplay of a gacha game it's either mostly a few button presses or turn-based.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I feel like the only beatlebro who is completely disinterested in Love. I don't …
entry.content: I feel like the only beatlebro who is completely disinterested in Love. I don't like it or hate it either way, it just never appealed to me. It never made me hear the Beatles in a new light or help me "rediscover" them in a cool new way. If it had that effect for you, that's great. But to me it just seemed like a big whatever.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >After all these successful movies, you know what i really want to make? >the ne…
entry.content: >After all these successful movies, you know what i really want to make? >the netflix sloppest of netfllix slop movies >yes, bring in that punisher guy and the trannoid >and a FISTFUL OF NIGGERS >Subject matter? Idk some greek epic or some shit. It doesn't matter in the end. Bravo... BRAVO NOLAN
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Removing the 35 minutes of Abstergo scenes from Black Flag has completely fucked…
entry.content: Removing the 35 minutes of Abstergo scenes from Black Flag has completely fucked the pacing and story cohesion of the remake. I cannot believe they took a game with a story that made sense and offered genuine critique of Ubisoft behind the scenes, and turned it into awful, disjointed slop where the game time jumps months and years with zero context. The game was NEVER intended to be structured like this. It's an explicitly episodic narrative where you would be given new orders, told WHY you are
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: > Warner Brothers lost $300 million with Supergirl > Universal on track to lose …

entry.content: Listen, every few nights I like to dress up in women's clothing and I run down, down here in downtown Dallas and I like to jackoff, VIOLENTLY. I feel that I can only – well that's not a joke. Only then when I'm in this state do I feel that I can truly empathize with the liberal elites. I've infiltrated them
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Are modern games from '20s just not as fun anymore as the '10s and before that? …
entry.content: Are modern games from '20s just not as fun anymore as the '10s and before that? The PS5 and Xbox series S/X are good machines, but only good to run older games. New ones feel boring... Anyone else feel like this or am I tripping?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /b/ Random: Putin Says ®
entry.content: Yesterday, Putin said due to Trump attacking Iran, the global economy is going into a depression... and he warned the entire planet: this is going to be worse than the COVID pandemic according to Putin, Trump violated the terms in his own ceasefire, and now Iran has said they're NOT going to sign any treaties with America. Trump has been advised repeatedly by his staff and military generals that if we send ground troops in, they will be slaughtered wholesale, it's unwinnable, and he's been repea
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: Sports
entry.content: Setting: A bright, cardboard kitchen. Red Guy is listlessly folding a checkered dish towel. Duck is aggressively buttering a piece of toast. Yellow Guy is sitting on the floor, staring intensely at a blank wall. RED GUY (Sighs) There is absolutely nothing to do today. DUCK Nonsense! There is always toast to be buttered. Look at it. Smooth. Uniform. It is a productive endeavor. YELLOW GUY (Suddenly stands up, pointing at his chest) My heart is making a very fast thumping noise. Like a little tap
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >Of the album's complex drum programming, he said "it's quite similar to guitar …
entry.content: >Of the album's complex drum programming, he said "it's quite similar to guitar solos, only with programming you have to use your brain. The most important thing is that it should have some emotional effect on me, rather than just, 'Oh, that's really clever.'" RDJ just explained why I don't like Autechre

entry.title: /news/ News: Huge setback for Project2025 goals after judge rules US Government can't nix grants due to new rules
entry.content: https://www.politico.com/live-updat es/2026/07/17/congress/judge-knocks -omb-grant-termination-01003836 A federal judge declared Friday that the Trump administration can’t cancel grants based on new rules or goals established after the fact — in a blow to its efforts to terminate billions of dollars already promised. U.S. District Judge Indira Talwani, an Obama appointee, denied the Trump administration’s request to dismiss a lawsuit brought by 20 states, three governors and the District of Colu
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8375 Hyper Muscles Guys Edition Previous Thread: >>84139…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8375 Hyper Muscles Guys Edition Previous Thread: >>84139841 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: ANOTHER ONE BITES THE DUST
entry.content: https://www.engadget.com/2213731/on eplus-is-officially-leaving-the-us- and-europe/ >OnePlus and Oppo are jointly announcing that the former will no longer launch new devices in Europe and North America. The companies are framing it as a new "strategic focus" and wouldn't explicitly state where (or whether) OnePlus will continue to launch products. >Oppo says the decision will fold in OnePlus's capabilities, technologies, and product philosophy – OnePlus co-founder Peter Lau recently rejoined Op

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >What people are usually relying on for “blond” is a very specific adjective, wh…
entry.content: >What people are usually relying on for “blond” is a very specific adjective, which is xanthus in Greek, but it’s really hard to know. It’s very unlikely that the Greeks would do what we do, which is use a hair color as the epitome of a larger set of physical characteristics. Why should we assume that golden is a hair color rather than an aura? Why wouldn’t golden be something that’s describing a quality of character rather than a physical description? >the notion of the Greeks as blond really b
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: is this a valid route
entry.content: Im studying CS right now (yeah i know shut up) and aside from all the doom and gloom around the job market and AI, i dont even know if i wanna work in my field anymore... I had a situation last semester where i was paired up with a guy in a project to write a filesystem and he kept pushing AI code without reviewing it just so he can hop on his game, i felt like a janitor and realized that i don't wanna do this for the rest of my life and that i don't really like working in a group. Im thinking o
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I was't able to smoke weed for like a week cause we ran out of weed money, so i …
entry.content: I was't able to smoke weed for like a week cause we ran out of weed money, so i was on a 4 day t break, and then my grandma lended my mom some money for weed and i was finally able to smoke again, and now that my tolerance is a bit lower the weed's more potent again i am very happy :D

entry.title: /g/ Technology: modded spotify clients keep breaking so i finally installed a bloated mod fork o…
entry.content: modded spotify clients keep breaking so i finally installed a bloated mod fork of youtube music and it fucking sucks, downloads dont even work unless you install yt dlp or an outdated fork of newpipe that also doesn't work.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: You walk toward the town center of the MAID containment zone with your companion…
entry.content: You walk toward the town center of the MAID containment zone with your companion until night falls. The two of you go into an abandoned building to spend the night. Inside, you see a young man, barefoot (pic related) kneeling on the floor. He smells of pee and the floor underneath him is filthy. He says his companion got killed by one of the MAID cleanup crews, but they let him live. Now he cannot get into the town center because you're not allowed to enter without a companion. He has been roami
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /vip/ VIP: The Odyssey
entry.content: This is the Odyssey by Nolan thread. Given the slow nature of /vip/ I hope this thread lasts enough to see the evolution of opinions about the movie. Nolan is (in)famous for making nut brains explode and unable to think. So I just want to see how it evolves. >Aurachad picture btw.
entry.dc:creator: /vip/ VIP
